title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, tool use, and long-context workflows. It supports up to one-million-token context windows and is compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI API endpoints. The model is natively multimodal and integrates with coding environments like Cursor and Cline through MiniMax Code.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents, tool use, and long-context work, alongside MiniMax Code as its coding integration. It matters because M3 positions itself as an alternative to Claude and Codex, with compatibility for both Anthropic and OpenAI API endpoints. Key takeaways: the model supports context windows up to one million tokens, is natively multimodal, and connects to coding environments including Cursor and Cline through MiniMax Code.
